description_long: This jewelry set consists of a beaded necklace and matching earrings, displayed on a smooth, gray bust stand. The necklace features a sequence of round beads, predominantly cream and light brown in color, with some beads exhibiting marbled or speckled patterns. The beads are strung in a graduated arrangement, with larger beads at the center and smaller ones toward the clasp. The earrings are simple drop-style, each with a single bead matching those on the necklace, suspended from a metallic hook. The overall design is naturalistic and earthy, with a focus on the organic appearance of the beads. The set exudes a handcrafted, artisanal quality, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear.
description: A beaded necklace and matching drop earrings with cream and brown marbled beads, displayed on a gray bust stand. The jewelry has an earthy, handcrafted look with a natural motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace draped around the bust and the matching earrings hanging in the center.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the necklace and the rounded shape of the beads.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the necklace with small, uniform beads and the clasp area.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the necklace's side profile and bead arrangement.
